## What you want to do

<!-- Describe the editing task or workflow you're trying to accomplish.
Concrete is better than abstract: "I want to remove all my own laughs from
30-min gameplay videos automatically" beats "support for emotion detection". -->

## Why the current behavior doesn't work

<!-- What do you try today? What's missing or painful about it? -->

## What you'd want it to look like

<!-- Rough sketch. Could be a UI flow, a CLI invocation, an Ask Cadence
prompt, a JSON output shape, whatever fits. -->

## Anything you've already considered

<!-- Workarounds, similar tools, prior art. Helps avoid "have you tried X"
back-and-forth. -->
